title: SFPD arrests man in San Francisco's first homicide of 2025
summary: A 29-year-old man, Jose Rivera Flores, was arrested for an early-morning shooting at a business on the 500 block of South Van Ness Avenue between 16th and 17th streets — SF's first homicide of 2025.
address: 500 block of South Van Ness Ave (between 16th & 17th)

title: Mission NYE homicide: shots fired after pump issue, confrontation
summary: Witnesses described a confrontation over a gas-pump issue that escalated into gunfire near 16th and South Van Ness on New Year's Eve.

title: Friday night stabbing in the Tenderloin leaves one person injured
summary: SFPD investigated a stabbing in the Tenderloin where officers found one victim with an injury from an edged weapon; transported with non-life-threatening injuries.

title: SFPD investigates Northern District homicide 25-032
summary: On March 2, 2025, SFPD officers responded to the 600 block of Larch Alley regarding a shooting and located an adult male victim with a gunshot wound.

title: SFPD searches for suspect who shot, killed man in Bernal Heights
summary: A man was shot and killed outside the Alemany public housing complex on the south side of Bernal Heights — SF's third homicide of 2025.

title: SFPD arrest suspect in fatal Tenderloin shooting
summary: A victim was shot and killed at the edge of the Tenderloin on a Monday afternoon — SF's fifth homicide of 2025. SFPD made an arrest.

title: SFPD investigating Mission District homicide 25-057
summary: SFPD Homicide Detail responded to a Mission District homicide. No arrests at the time of release; open and active investigation.

title: SFPD investigates Ingleside District homicide 25-058
summary: On May 5, 2025, officers responded to the 1900 block of Sunnydale Avenue on a report of a shooting and located two male victims with gunshot wounds.

title: SFPD investigates Park District homicide 25-059
summary: On May 6, 2025, officers responded to the unit block of Laguna Street on a report of a deceased person. The Medical Examiner determined the death was suspicious.

title: SFPD arrests suspect for Mission District daylight killing of 19-year-old
summary: Trayvon Williams was charged in the daylight shooting that killed 19-year-old Keyandre Elijah Bates — San Francisco's sixth homicide of 2025.

title: SFPD arrests Central District homicide suspect (25-061)
summary: On May 14, 2025, an unknown male shot at another occupied vehicle near Columbus Avenue and Northpoint Street. 44-year-old Abraham Torres was arrested.

title: SFPD investigates Bayview District homicide 25-065
summary: On May 27, 2025, officers found an adult male with an apparent stab wound. Daniel Garcia, 51, was booked for homicide, assault with a deadly weapon, and elder abuse.

title: SFPD makes three arrests in July Central District homicide 25-088
summary: On July 3, 2025, officers responded to a well-being check at Vandewater and Powell streets and found an adult male with a gunshot wound. Three suspects were arrested.

title: SFPD investigates Bayview District homicide 25-087
summary: On July 5, 2025, officers responded to a shooting on the 100 block of Harbor Road. Five victims were transported, including two with life-threatening injuries; one died.

title: SFPD investigates Taraval District homicide 25-095
summary: On July 26, 2025, officers responded to Ocean Ave and Lee Ave for a stabbing. 29-year-old Sean Collins of San Francisco was booked for homicide.

title: Man fighting for life after daylight shooting near 16th and Mission
summary: A man was critically wounded in a broad-daylight shooting near 16th and Mission streets.

title: SFPD investigates Bayview homicide 25-099
summary: On August 11, 2025, SFPD investigated a Bayview homicide where one victim was declared deceased at the hospital. SFPD Homicide Detail leads the investigation.

title: SFPD investigates Taraval homicide 25-115
summary: On September 10, 2025, officers responded to Junipero Serra Boulevard and Ocean Avenue for a stabbing. The male victim succumbed to his injuries.

title: SFPD investigates homicide in the Tenderloin 25-110
summary: SFPD Homicide Detail led the investigation of a Tenderloin homicide; open and active investigation at time of release.

title: SFPD investigates Tenderloin homicide 25-120
summary: SFPD Homicide Detail responded to a Tenderloin homicide scene and is leading the investigation.

title: What we know about the fatal Mission District shooting early Sunday
summary: At ~12:25 a.m. on Nov 16, 2025, officers responded to the 3000 block of 16th Street (16th & Valencia). A street fight escalated; 23-year-old Larry Hudgson Jr. was arrested on suspicion of murder.

title: SFPD investigates Taraval District homicide 25-146
summary: On November 23, 2025, officers responded to the 200 block of Granada Avenue regarding a residential burglary and found an adult victim with serious injuries.

title: SFPD arrests suspect in Southern District homicide 25-148
summary: At ~12:15 a.m. on Nov 30, 2025, officers found an unknown male at 6th & Natoma streets with gunshot wounds; declared deceased on scene. Derral Robi (48) was arrested.

title: SFPD investigates Tenderloin District homicide 25-150
summary: On December 2, 2025, SFPD Homicide Detail responded to a Tenderloin homicide scene and led the investigation.

title: UPDATE: SFPD Homicide Detail leads stabbing incident at SF General Hospital 25-152
summary: The victim was declared deceased on Dec 6, 2025. Investigators arrested 34-year-old Wilfredo Tortolero Arriechi of San Francisco.

title: Crime fell nationwide last year. But in S.F., drug offenses soared 54%.
summary: Year-end analysis: SF homicides hit their lowest count in 70 years (28 in 2025) even as drug offenses climbed 54% citywide.

title: Mission District shooting marks San Francisco's first killing of 2026
summary: A Mission District shooting was San Francisco's first reported homicide of 2026.

title: Tenderloin shooting is second S.F. homicide this week
summary: On Feb 12, 2026, a man was killed in broad daylight near Turk and Taylor streets. Sefanaia Alatini, 37, of Oakland was arrested for murder.

title: Teen girl dies following triple shooting near busy park in SF's Western Addition
summary: On Jan 31, 2026, three people were shot near Golden Gate Avenue and Laguna Street, near Margaret S. Hayward Park. One juvenile victim died.

title: S.F. shooting leaves one dead, two wounded in Potrero Hill
summary: A shooting in Potrero Hill left one person dead and two wounded.

title: Suspect in unprovoked SF Chinatown stabbing charged with attempted murder
summary: At ~1:13 p.m. on a Thursday in March 2026, a man pulled a knife and stabbed a stranger in the back at Stockton and Sacramento streets. 37-year-old Jian Feng Huang was arrested.

title: Grandfather killed in brutal Potrero shooting wanted to leave troubled life behind, friends say
summary: Cornelius Wigfall was shot and killed in a brutal Potrero Hill homicide; friends say he wanted to leave his troubled past behind.

title: Man fatally shot, 2 others assaulted in San Francisco's SoMa
summary: On March 27, 2026, at ~11:12 p.m. at Third and Harrison streets, officers found a man with gunshot wounds; he was pronounced dead at the hospital. Two suspects were arrested.

title: 2 people shot in separate incidents in SoMa and Parkmerced Saturday
summary: Two separate shootings on the same Saturday — one in SoMa and one in Parkmerced — left two people wounded.

title: 2 people shot in separate incidents in SoMa and Parkmerced Saturday (Parkmerced)
summary: Companion to the SoMa shooting on April 4, 2026: a second person was shot in Parkmerced the same evening.

title: Mission District shooting leaves victim in critical condition
summary: A shooting that grew out of a 'big fight' in the Mission left one victim in critical condition.

title: SFPD arrests suspect in Tenderloin homicide 26-015
summary: SFPD arrested a suspect in connection with a Tenderloin homicide in early 2026.

title: SFPD investigates homicide in the Bayview Police District 26-020
summary: SFPD investigated an early-2026 Bayview homicide; Homicide Detail led the investigation.

title: SoMa shooting: SF dispensary owner shot multiple times; suspect dies in police standoff
summary: A SoMa dispensary owner was shot multiple times; the suspect was later killed in a standoff with police.

title: San Francisco police arrest suspect in deadly Mission District shooting
summary: SFPD arrested a suspect tied to a deadly Mission District shooting on 16th Street.

title: 2 hospitalized after being shot in San Francisco's Tenderloin
summary: Two men were hospitalized after a Tenderloin shooting; SFPD investigated.

title: One fatally shot in SF's Marina
summary: One person was fatally shot in San Francisco's Marina district, a neighborhood that rarely sees homicides.

title: Shocking daylight stabbing in SF's Chinatown caught on video
summary: Surveillance video captured a daylight stabbing in Chinatown that left a man with life-threatening injuries.

title: Man shot dead in San Francisco's Mission District
summary: A man was shot dead in the Mission District near Mission Street and 20th.

title: Daly City police chase into S.F. leads to multi-car crash
summary: A Sonoma County robbery suspect was chased by Daly City police into San Francisco, ending in a multi-car crash on San Jose Avenue near Bernal Heights / Glen Park.
address: San Jose Ave near Glen Park

title: SFPD investigating homicide in the Ingleside District 25-034
summary: SFPD Homicide Detail responded to an Ingleside District homicide and led the investigation.

title: Victim critically injured in San Francisco shooting hours after ceasefire plea
summary: Hours after SF leaders announced a one-day ceasefire to curb gun violence, a victim was critically injured in a Mission District shooting.

title: San Francisco homicides fall 35% as violent crime declines
summary: Mid-year analysis: SF homicides were down 35% year-over-year through August 2025, part of a broader violent-crime decline.

title: Mission District shooting: 1 injured, 2 detained, SFPD says
summary: SFPD investigated a Mission District shooting that left one person injured and two detained.

title: S.F. police raid at Market and Van Ness yielded 40 arrests, but no charges
summary: An SFPD raid at Market and Van Ness produced 40 arrests but no criminal charges, raising due-process questions.

title: SF leaders announce 1-day ceasefire to curb gun violence, hours before Mission shooting
summary: Hours after a one-day ceasefire was announced, a shooting in the Mission underscored ongoing gun violence concerns.
